remindersAreNotFinished.header: pali li pini ala lon pana sin sona!
remindersAreNotFinished.content: tenpo ni la, ni ale li pana ala! ken la sina ken kepeken ni lon tenpo kama, taso, tenpo ni la ilo pana li lon ala. sina kepeken ilo Android la sina ken pali e pana sin sona; ilo pana li pini la, ni li pana e pana sin sona tawa sina. o sona e ni; sina kepeken ilo Web la, ilo pana li pana ala. kin la, sina pali e ilo sama ilo ni la, o lawa e mi!
